info.name: Calendar Phase 9 â€” Task Deadlines on Range B5

exec: function assertStatus(code) { pm.response.to.have.status(code); }pm.test('Login U1',()=>assertStatus(200)); pm.collectionVariables.set('token_u1', pm.response.json().accessToken);
function assertStatus(code) { pm.response.to.have.status(code); }pm.test('Profile U1',()=>assertStatus(200)); pm.collectionVariables.set('userId_u1', pm.response.json().userId.toString());
function assertStatus(code) { pm.response.to.have.status(code); }pm.test('Login U2',()=>assertStatus(200)); pm.collectionVariables.set('token_u2', pm.response.json().accessToken);
function assertStatus(code) { pm.response.to.have.status(code); }pm.test('Profile U2',()=>assertStatus(200)); pm.collectionVariables.set('userId_u2', pm.response.json().userId.toString());
function assertStatus(code) { pm.response.to.have.status(code); }pm.test('Login U4',()=>assertStatus(200)); pm.collectionVariables.set('token_u4', pm.response.json().accessToken);
function assertStatus(code) { pm.response.to.have.status(code); }pm.test('Profile U4',()=>assertStatus(200)); pm.collectionVariables.set('userId_u4', pm.response.json().userId.toString());
const personal = list.find(c => c.type === 'Personal' || c.Type === 'Personal') || list[0];
const td = items.find(i => i.kind === 'TaskDeadline' && i.taskId === tid);
pm.test('B5-2 eventId null on task', () => pm.expect(td.eventId).to.be.null);
pm.test('B5-3 still has Event', () => pm.expect(items.some(i => i.kind === 'Event')).to.be.true);

item.name: P9-1 U4 cannot see U1 task

exec: pm.test('P9-1 other user task hidden', () => pm.expect(items.every(i => i.taskId !== tid)).to.be.true);
function assertStatus(code) { pm.response.to.have.status(code); }pm.test('P9-2 create assigned 200', () => assertStatus(200));

item.name: P9-2b U2 range has assigned task

exec: pm.test('P9-2b assigned task visible', () => pm.expect(items.some(i => i.kind === 'TaskDeadline' && i.taskId === tid)).to.be.true);
